title: sorbus pinnatifida var. quercifolia
intro: Sorbus pinnatifida var. quercifolia, also known as the oak-leaved rowan, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sorbus pinnatifida var. quercifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, as well as having potential benefits in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Sorbus pinnatifida var. quercifolia may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other remedies.
